    § I

    Templates

    Reusable prompt patterns by task, tool, and expected output.

    § II

    Examples

    Breakdowns of strong outputs, why they work, and which lab to try next.

    § IV

    Practice Lab

    Module-linked exercises for testing variables, comparing modes, and building taste after class.

    § V

    From Ed

    Case studies and references, presented like a magazine table of contents.

    § My Progress
    Your learning journey — sessions completed, badges earned.
    § Teacher Panel
    Course controls, session unlocks, student tracker.

    ⚙ Active Session

    Session Access

    Tap the highest session number each course should open up to. Changes preview locally — hit Publish to push to students.

    Publish to students
    Students live-update within 20 seconds of your push.
    In sync with students

    Offering Access

    Control what appears in Learn. Catalog still shows the full academy map; these switches only decide whether each offering is open, teased, locked, or hidden for the selected student/group.

    CatalogAlways shows the full academy offer map: available, preview, locked, and coming soon. LearnShows only offerings opened for the current student, group, or global default. No database yetTeacher changes save locally and export as JSON; the same shape can move to a backend later.
